xposts.title: Gods and spirits as collective agency dynamics
xposts.excerpt: Gods exist and act on the world, in the same sense as personal conscious selfs exist, run on human brains and act on the world. In the same way as the dynamics of your nervous system give rise to your spirit, the dynamics of collective agency give rise to the spirits of gods.

xposts.title: Spiritual guides must interface with actual spirits
xposts.excerpt: To be effective, spiritual guides must interface with the spirits that are actually there. Tribal shamans linked small groups and individuals to the raw spirits of nature, Catholic priests link to the spirit of the papal empire, twitter influencers to the telos of their egregore

xposts.title: We are all possessed by spirits
xposts.excerpt: We are all possessed by spirits

xposts.title: Minds as software colonizing computational substrate
xposts.excerpt: A self organizing system is a colonial empire that must extract more negentropy from its tributaries than it takes to structure them. I wonder if it makes sense to view minds from the perspective of a software colonizing its computational substrate, too.

terms.title: spirits
terms.definition: Spirits are self-organizing dynamics of agency arising from nervous systems or collective structures, analogous to personal consciousness or gods, that can possess or interface with individuals and groups.

terms.title: egregore
terms.definition: An egregore is the telos or spirit of a collective agency, such as that of social media or empires, which influencers or guides link to and which can corrupt or direct human behavior.
